name: ddvb-tech-plugins
description: DDVB TECH plugins for Claude Code — product scoping, commercial proposals, brand strategy, naming, and more

plugins.name: ddvb-product-lab
plugins.description: Product scoping from brainstorming to blueprints, and commercial proposal generation in ddvb.tech website format

plugins.name: brand-strategy
plugins.description: End-to-end brand repositioning workflow: spec, plan, review, execute. Extracts briefs from PDFs, builds SWOT/competitive analysis, develops brand platform, generates PPTX presentations with DDVB branding.

plugins.name: ddvb-naming-lab
plugins.description: Brand naming workflow: competitive research, copywriter brief, AI-assisted seed generation, candidate evaluation with scoring matrix, and client presentation.
